name: makermint-purescript
description: PureScript example applications for testing LLM capabilities

scripts.app:todo:build: mkdir -p public/apps/todo && ./node_modules/.bin/spago bundle --module Examples.Apps.TodoApp.TodoApp --outfile public/apps/todo/app.js --platform browser && cp src/Examples/Apps/TodoApp/index.html public/apps/todo/
scripts.app:todo:dev: npm run app:todo:build && npx http-server public/apps/todo -p 9090 -o
scripts.game:tictactoe:build: mkdir -p public/games/tictactoe && ./node_modules/.bin/spago bundle --module Examples.Games.TicTacToe.TicTacToe --outfile public/games/tictactoe/app.js --platform browser && cp src/Examples/Games/TicTacToe/index.html public/games/tictactoe/
scripts.game:tictactoe:dev: npm run game:tictactoe:build && npx http-server public/games/tictactoe -p 9091 -o
scripts.game:snake:build: mkdir -p public/games/snake && ./node_modules/.bin/spago bundle --module Examples.Games.Snake.Snake --outfile public/games/snake/app.js --platform browser && cp src/Examples/Games/Snake/index.html public/games/snake/
scripts.game:snake:dev: npm run game:snake:build && npx http-server public/games/snake -p 9092 -o
scripts.game:breakout:build: mkdir -p public/games/breakout && ./node_modules/.bin/spago bundle --module Examples.Games.Breakout.Breakout --outfile public/games/breakout/app.js --platform browser && cp src/Examples/Games/Breakout/index.html public/games/breakout/
scripts.game:breakout:dev: npm run game:breakout:build && npx http-server public/games/breakout -p 9093 -o
